mapper.select: SELECT A.MTRL_CD as mtrlCd, C.MTRL_NM as mtrlNm, A.STOCK_QTY as stockQty, A.AGNT_CD as agntCd, D.AGNT_NM AS agntNm FROM TBL_STOCK A, TBL_WH_LOC_M B, TBL_MTRL_M C, TBL_AGENCY_M D WHERE A.LOC_ID = B.LOC_ID AND A.MTRL_CD = C.MTRL_CD AND A.AGNT_CD = C.AGNT_CD AND A.AGNT_CD = D.AGNT_CD AND A.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND B.LOC_CD = #{locationCd} AND A.STOCK_QTY > 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_STOCK_MOVE_LOG ( CMPY_CD, AGNT_CD, MTRL_CD, FROM_LOC_ID, TO_LOC_ID, MOVE_QTY, MOVE_TYPE, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_USER ) SELECT #{cmpyCd}, #{agntCd}, #{mtrlCd}, (SELECT TOP 1 LOC_ID FROM TBL_WH_LOC_M WHERE LOC_CD = #{fromLocationCd} AND CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd}), (SELECT TOP 1 LOC_ID FROM TBL_WH_LOC_M WHERE LOC_CD = #{toLocationCd} AND CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd}), #{moveQty}, /* [수정] 데이터 타입을 VARCHAR로 명시하여 varbinary 변환 오류 해결 */ ISNULL(CAST(#{moveType} AS VARCHAR(20)), 'NORMAL'), GETDATE(), #{userId} /* 로케이션 존재 여부 체크 (기존 로직 유지) */ WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TBL_WH_LOC_M WHERE LOC_CD = #{toLocationCd} AND CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd}) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TBL_WH_LOC_M WHERE LOC_CD = #{fromLocationCd} AND CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd})
